Careers
Thank you for your interest in Wellington West!

We welcome your application and cover letter for any of the available positions listed below and look forward to learning more about you. We will ensure the right department receives your application, and we’ll keep it on file for 6 months.

If you are a person with a disability and have a question or require assistance with the recruitment and selection process, please make your request at the time of application.

All applicants must be legally entitled to work in Canada. As a condition of employment, a Criminal Record Search, which includes a vulnerable sector screen, and a current TB test will be required.

If no opportunities are currently listed, please check back.

Job Postings
There are no jobs available at this time. Please check back at a later date.
